tool_args.label: NYCT Security Camera Program
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT Security Camera Program. Stations: 472 out of 472 stations with CCTV. Rolling Stock: 3% rolling stock equipped with cameras.

payload.description: 472 out of 472 stations with CCTV; 3% rolling stock equipped with cameras. Includes 6 Projects/$293.3 Million dollars, 106 Station installation of Passenger Identification Cameras, and installation of cameras on subway rolling stock. Pending: 128 Passenger Identification, Laser Intrusion and Camera upgrades in Tunnels, Complete Station Complex Enhanced Security Designs.

tool_args.label: LIRR Security Camera Program
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR Security Camera Program. Stations: 83 out of 124 stations with CCTV. Rolling Stock: 100% rolling stock equipped with cameras.

payload.description: 83 out of 124 stations with CCTV; 100% rolling stock equipped with cameras. 12 Projects/$292 Million dollars. Major projects include East Side Access (97% Complete), Main Line Third Track System wide expansion projects (80% Complete), Penn Station Improvement – Phase 2.

tool_args.label: MNR Security Camera Program
tool_args.raw_text: MNR Security Camera Program. Stations: 55 Out of 124 Stations equipped with CCTV. Rolling Stock: 100% rolling stock equipped with cameras.

payload.description: 55 Out of 124 Stations equipped with CCTV; 100% rolling stock equipped with cameras. 3 Projects, $11.1 Million dollars. Major Project: Grand Central Terminal (GCT) State of Good Repair/Camera Coverage Expansion Strategy. Station Project: New Haven Line – 8 Stations CCTV.

tool_args.label: Grade Crossing Enhancement Projects
tool_args.raw_text: Mr. Warren described the various efforts with stakeholders and partners. He went on to highlight the various grant programs being utilized to improve safety at Grade Crossings across the system.

payload.description: Various efforts with stakeholders and partners to improve safety at grade crossings across the system, utilizing various grant programs

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: LIRR Main Line Third Track Project
tool_args.raw_text: Chair Lieber highlighted the elimination of eight grade crossings as part of the third track project.

payload.description: Elimination of eight grade crossings as part of the third track project

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: No new NTSB onsite investigations since July 2020
tool_args.raw_text: No new formal onsite investigations from July 2020 to current

payload.claim_text: No new formal onsite investigations from July 2020 to current
payload.subject: NTSB Recommendations

tool_args.label: Homeless Outreach Program overview
tool_args.raw_text: Mr. Warren provided an overview of the programs being implemented across the enterprise to address these challenges and quality of life concerns. End of line and Grand Central Terminal Committee.

payload.claim_text: MTA has programs being implemented across the enterprise to address homelessness on trains and throughout the system, including quality of life concerns at End of line and Grand Central Terminal.
payload.subject: Homeless Outreach Program

tool_args.label: MNR employee hours estimated due to timekeeping issue
tool_args.raw_text: Due to a global issue impacting the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)'s time keeping system, employee hours of work for Transportation were estimated for April 2022 - September 2022.

payload.gap_text: Due to a global issue impacting the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)'s time keeping system, employee hours of work for Transportation were estimated for April 2022 - September 2022. The MTA is working to correct the problem and will update the affected employee injury rates after it is resolved.
payload.missing_information: Employee hours for Transportation were estimated rather than actual

tool_args.label: Workplace Violence case numbers subject to change
tool_args.raw_text: *Case numbers are subject to change based on investigation updates and late reporting. Preliminary March Data Included.

payload.gap_text: *Case numbers are subject to change based on investigation updates and late reporting. Preliminary March Data Included.
payload.missing_information: Workplace Violence case numbers are preliminary and subject to change

tool_args.label: MTA random positivity rates below national average
tool_args.raw_text: According to Quest Diagnostics 2021 Annual Drug Testing Index (DTI) national report, the random positivity rate for Federally Mandated (safety-sensitive) workforce was 1.9%. MTA's Random positivity rates for all agencies are all below 1%.

payload.claim_text: MTA's Random positivity rates for all agencies are all below 1%. National random positivity rate for Federally Mandated (safety-sensitive) workforce was 1.9% per Quest Diagnostics 2021 Annual Drug Testing Index.
payload.subject: Drug & Alcohol Testing
